# platformInfraInsertNodeAtPath

Execute the platformInfraInsertNodeAtPath mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk platform-infra-insert-node-at-path --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.data <JSON> --input.kids <UUID> --input.ktree <String> --input.path <String> --input.root <UUID> --input.sId <UUID>
```
